About Bahria Town Lahore 
 
bahria Town Pvt. Ltd. Was Founded In The Late-1990s By Malik Riaz Hussain. It Established Its Headquarters In Rawalpindi On The Grand Trunk Road. 
 
the Company S First Exclusive Gated Community Was Also Constructed In Rawalpindi. However, By Mid-2000s, Bahria Town Launched Its Second Such Project In Southern Lahore That Was Famously Inspired By Greco-roman Culture. 
 
bahria Town Is A City In Itself. If You Live Here, You Do Not Have To Travel To The Main City To Go Shopping. From High-end Clothing And Accessory Brands To Local Grocery Products, This Society Provides Its Residents With A Wide Variety Of Retail Options. 
 
bahria Town Lahore Has Its Own Power Generation System, Which Ensures There Is No Load-shedding In The Society. Siemens Has Installed And Commissioned A Grid Station That Produces 78 Mwa With 132 Kva Transmission Lines. 
 
an Uninterrupted Power Supply Is One Of The Most Sought-after Features Of Any Housing Society. This Is One Of The Biggest Reasons Why A Lot Of People Want To Invest In Property In Bahria Town Lahore. 
 
bahria Town Lahore Has At Least Five Major Hospitals And Healthcare Facilities As Of January 2019. Bahria International Hospital Is In Takbeer Block In Sector B, While Akhtar Saeed Medical College And Hospital Is In Tulip Block Of Sector C. 
 
life Care Hospital Is In Sector D And Bahria International Hospital Orchard And Begum Akhtar Rukhsana Memorial Trust Hospital Are In Bahria Orchard.

the Company S First Exclusive Gated Community Was Also Constructed In Rawalpindi. However, By Mid-2000s, Bahria Town Launched Its Second Such Project In Southern Lahore That Was Famously Inspired By Greco-roman Culture. 
 
bahria Town Is A City In Itself. If You Live Here, You Do Not Have To Travel To The Main City To Go Shopping. From High-end Clothing And Accessory Brands To Local Grocery Products, This Society Provides Its Residents With A Wide Variety Of Retail Options. 
 
bahria Town Lahore Has Its Own Power Generation System, Which Ensures There Is No Load-shedding In The Society. Siemens Has Installed And Commissioned A Grid Station That Produces 78 Mwa With 132 Kva Transmission Lines. 
 
an Uninterrupted Power Supply Is One Of The Most Sought-after Features Of Any Housing Society. This Is One Of The Biggest Reasons Why A Lot Of People Want To Invest In Property In Bahria Town Lahore. 
 
bahria Town Lahore Has At Least Five Major Hospitals And Healthcare Facilities As Of January 2019. Bahria International Hospital Is In Takbeer Block In Sector B, While Akhtar Saeed Medical College And Hospital Is In Tulip Block Of Sector C. 
 
life Care Hospital Is In Sector D And Bahria International Hospital Orchard And Begum Akhtar Rukhsana Memorial Trust Hospital Are In Bahria Orchard.

The Company S First Exclusive Gated Community Was Also Constructed In Rawalpindi. However, By Mid-2000s, Bahria Town Launched Its Second Such Project In Southern Lahore That Was Famously Inspired By Greco-Roman Culture. 
 
Bahria Town Is A City In Itself. If You Live Here, You Do Not Have To Travel To The Main City To Go Shopping. From High-End Clothing And Accessory Brands To Local Grocery Products, This Society Provides Its Residents With A Wide Variety Of Retail Options. 
 
Bahria Town Lahore Has Its Own Power Generation System, Which Ensures There Is No Load-Shedding In The Society. Siemens Has Installed And Commissioned A Grid Station That Produces 78 Mwa With 132 Kva Transmission Lines. 
 
An Uninterrupted Power Supply Is One Of The Most Sought-After Features Of Any Housing Society. This Is One Of The Biggest Reasons Why A Lot Of People Want To Invest In Property In Bahria Town Lahore. 
 
Bahria Town Lahore Has At Least Five Major Hospitals And Healthcare Facilities As Of January 2019. Bahria International Hospital Is In Takbeer Block In Sector B, While Akhtar Saeed Medical College And Hospital Is In Tulip Block Of Sector C. 
 
Life Care Hospital Is In Sector D And Bahria International Hospital Orchard And Begum Akhtar Rukhsana Memorial Trust Hospital Are In Bahria Orchard.
